chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-109 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 12.12.2025 Mr.Pir Bux Bhurgri, Advocate for the applicants Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State ******* Learned counsel for the applicants submits that he no longer wishes to proceed with this lis and seeks withdrawal thereof. Accordingly, the matter is dismissed as withdrawn in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
